testcase.name: GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Create Data-Driven User A
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Create Data-Driven User B
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] GET /users - Validate schema contract integrity
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] GET /users/{id} - Verify resource persistence
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Reject invalid payload with 422 Unprocessable Entity
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Standard User] DELETE /users/{id} - Mitigate OWASP BOLA security vulnerability
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Create Data-Driven User A
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Create Data-Driven User B
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] GET /users - Validate schema contract integrity
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] GET /users/{id} - Verify resource persistence
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Admin] POST /users - Reject invalid payload with 422 Unprocessable Entity
GoREST Enterprise Suite › [Standard User] DELETE /users/{id} - Mitigate OWASP BOLA security vulnerability
